query:
-- Test öğrenci 1 için stages oluştur (14-17 yaş grubu)
INSERT INTO user_stages (userId, stageId, status, unlockedAt, createdAt, updatedAt)
SELECT 
  u.id as userId,
  s.id as stageId,
  CASE WHEN s.order = 1 THEN 'active' ELSE 'locked' END as status,
  CASE WHEN s.order = 1 THEN NOW() ELSE NULL END as unlockedAt,
  NOW() as createdAt,
  NOW() as updatedAt
FROM users u
CROSS JOIN stages s
WHERE u.email = 'test.ogrenci1@gmail.com' 
  AND s.ageGroup = u.ageGroup;
